title: BEM-866 patch Claude mailbox write
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/claude.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
step = '''\n      - name: BEM-865 Claude mailbox write selftest\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.trace_id == 'bem865_claude_write_selftest' }}\n        run: |\n          mkdir -p governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude\n          cat > governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md <<'EOF'\n# BEM-865 CLAUDE WRITE SELFTEST RESPONSE\nStatus: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK\nWriter: claude.yml workflow_dispatch role adapter\nTrace: bem865_claude_write_selftest\nEOF\n\n'''
anchor = '      - name: Commit role result\n'
if 'BEM-865 Claude mailbox write selftest' not in text:
    if anchor in text:
        text = text.replace(anchor, step + anchor)
    else:
        # fallback before first job summary/report marker if commit anchor changes
        text = text + step
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CLAUDE_MAILBOX_WRITE_PATCHED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 Claude mailbox write patched\nStatus: PATCHED\nWorkflow: .github/workflows/claude.yml\nCondition: workflow_dispatch trace_id bem865_claude_write_selftest\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('patched claude.yml to write BEM865 selftest mailbox')
"""
